---
title: "Publications"
---

Mon nom apparaît en gras. Un astérisque (\*) signale un·e étudiant·e que je supervise.

## Articles de revue par les pairs

### 2026

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.**, Hörning, S., & Bàrdossy, A. (2026). A generalized FFTMA approach for simulating multivariate non-Gaussian random fields with spatial asymmetry. *Computers & Geosciences*, 212, 106157 (18 pages). [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/73766/)
:::

::: {.publication-item}
Pugliese, E., **Lauzon, D.**, Gargini, A., Dematteis, A., Rodani, S., & Benedetti, G. (2026). Risk assessment of tunnelling-induced hydrogeological interference on springs using a machine learning approach. *Hydrogeology Journal*. [lien](https://doi.org/10.1007/s10040-026-03102-6)
:::

### 2025

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.**, Straubhaar, J., & Renard, P. (2025). A Deep Generative Model for the Simulation of Discrete Karst Networks. *Earth and Space Science*, 12(10). [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/69264/)
:::

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.**, & Hörning, S. (2025). Efficient computation on large regular grids of higher-order spatial statistics via fast Fourier transform. *Computers & Geosciences*, 105878 (38 pages). [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/62683/)
:::

::: {.publication-item}
Liang, X. X., Gloaguen, E., Claprood, M., Paradis, D., & **Lauzon, D.** (2025). Graph Neural Network Framework for Spatiotemporal Groundwater Level Forecasting. *Mathematical Geosciences*, 23 pages. [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/66175/)
:::

### 2024

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.** (2024). A U-Net architecture as a surrogate model combined with a geostatistical spectral algorithm for transient groundwater flow inverse problems. *Advances in Water Resources*, 189, 104726 (14 pages). [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/58658/)
:::

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.**, & Gloaguen, E. (2024). Quantifying uncertainty and improving prospectivity mapping in mineral belts using transfer learning and Random Forest. *Ore Geology Reviews*, 166, 105918 (16 pages). [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/57570/)
:::

### 2023

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.**, & Marcotte, D. (2023). Joint hydrofacies-hydraulic conductivity modeling based on a constructive spectral algorithm constrained by transient head data. *Hydrogeology Journal*, 31(6), 1647-1664. [lien](https://doi.org/10.1007/s10040-023-02638-1)
:::

### 2022

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.**, & Marcotte, D. (2022). Statistical comparison of variogram-based inversion methods for conditioning to indirect data. *Computers & Geosciences*, 160, 105032 (15 pages). [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/50419/)
:::

### 2020

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.**, & Marcotte, D. (2020). Calibration of random fields by a sequential spectral turning bands method. *Computers & Geosciences*, 135, 104390 (13 pages). [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/44481/)
:::

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.**, & Marcotte, D. (2020). The sequential spectral turning band simulator as an alternative to Gibbs sampler in large truncated- or pluri-Gaussian simulations. *Stochastic Environmental Research and Risk Assessment*, 34(11), 1939-1951. [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/45764/)
:::

### 2019

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.**, & Marcotte, D. (2019). Calibration of random fields by FFTMA-SA. *Computers & Geosciences*, 127, 99-110. [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/42989/)
:::

## Conférences

### Articles de conférence revus par les pairs

::: {.publication-item}
Straubhaar, J., **Lauzon, D.**, & Renard, P. (2026). *Deep learning karst network generator*. EuroKarst 2026.
:::

::: {.publication-item}
Dion, G., Pasquier, P., & **Lauzon, D.** (2026). *Stochastic approach to ground heat exchanger sizing accounting for weather and ground property variability*. IGSHPA 2026.
:::

::: {.publication-item}
Brisebois, O.\*, **Lauzon, D.**, & Pasquier, P. (2026). *Investigation of a constructive geostatistical method to assimilate unused conventional data during geothermal drilling for hydraulic conductivity profiling*. IGSHPA 2026.
:::

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.** (2026). *From Data to Decisions: How Geostatistics Supports Geotechnical Engineering*. GeoQuébec 2026.
:::

::: {.publication-item}
Tagne Nkounga, I. B.\*, & **Lauzon, D.** (2026). *Automatic Spatial Inference of Stratigraphic Piles under Non-Stationary Conditions from Borehole Data*. GeoQuébec 2026.
:::

::: {.publication-item}
Kfoury, M., Roy, S., Langevin, M., **Lauzon, D.**, & Gosselin, Y. (2024). *Geostatistical analysis of geotechnical uncertainty: risk assessment in engineering projects*. GeoMTL 2024.
:::

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.**, & Marcotte, D. (2022). *On a constructive spectral method for conditioning pluriGaussian simulations to boreholes observations and indirect data*. GeoEnv 2022, Parma, Italia. [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/66955/)
:::

### Présentations orales

::: {.publication-item}
Renard, P., Straubhaar, J., **Lauzon, D.**, & Trunz, C. (2026). *Karst network simulation with statistical learning*. EGU General Assembly 2026, Vienna, Austria. [lien](https://doi.org/10.5194/egusphere-egu26-18554)
:::

::: {.publication-item}
Burgoa Tanaka, A. P., Renard, P., Liang, X. X., Straubhaar, J., & **Lauzon, D.** (2026). *Fracture network modeling with graph deep learning*. EGU General Assembly 2026, Vienna, Austria. [lien](https://doi.org/10.5194/egusphere-egu26-11471)
:::

::: {.publication-item}
Liang, X. X., **Lauzon, D.**, Gloaguen, E., Claprood, M., Straubhaar, J., & Renard, P. (2026). *Evaluating the influence of temporal data resolution on the performance of deep neural networks for karst groundwater forecasting*. IAMG 2026, Montréal, Canada.
:::

::: {.publication-item}
de Magalhães, G., Cacciari, P., & **Lauzon, D.** (2026). *A Bayesian–Geostatistical Framework for Inferring Fracture Volumetric Intensity in Rock Masses from Multiple Data Sources*. IAMG 2026, Montréal, Canada.
:::

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.**, Hörning, S., & Bárdossy, A. (2025). *A novel framework for stochastic simulation of multivariate non-Gaussian random fields*. EGU General Assembly 2025, Vienna, Austria. [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/63440/)
:::

::: {.publication-item}
Hörning, S., **Lauzon, D.**, & Bárdossy, A. (2025). *Spectral methods for non-linear co-regionalization*. EGU General Assembly 2025, Vienna, Austria. [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/64477/)
:::

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.** (2024). *Deep neural networks in surrogate hydrogeological modeling*. GeoEnv 2024, Chania, Greece. [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/58915/)
:::

::: {.publication-item}
Straubhaar, J., **Lauzon, D.**, & Renard, P. (2024). *Graph recurrent neural networks for stochastic simulation of Karst network topology and properties*. GeoEnv 2024, Chania, Greece. [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/58931/)
:::

### Affiches

::: {.publication-item}
Arega, K. A.\*, Benoit, N., **Lauzon, D.**, & Bédard, K. (2026). *Stochastic groundwater recharge modelling in the Harricana River sub-watershed, Québec*. IAH 2026, Canada.
:::

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.**, & Marcotte, D. (2022). *On a constructive spectral method for conditioning pluriGaussian simulations (poster)*. GeoEnv 2022, Parma, Italia. [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/58581/)
:::

### Sessions organisées

::: {.publication-item}
Dimitrakopoulos, R., & **Lauzon, D.** (2026). *Multi-point and High-order simulations*. IAMG 2026, Montréal, Canada.
:::

## Ateliers et formations

### 2026

::: {.publication-item}
Liang, X. X., Wen, T., & **Lauzon, D.** (2026). *Fundamental Deep Learning Concepts for Applied Geoscientists*. IAMG 2026, Montréal, Canada.
:::

## Thèses

### 2022

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.** (2022). *Développement d'algorithmes pour le calage de modèles géologiques* [Thèse de doctorat, Polytechnique Montréal]. [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/10318/)
:::

## Livres et ressources pédagogiques

### 2025

::: {.publication-item}
**Lauzon, D.** (2025). *Géostatistique et géologie minière* [Notes de cours]. [lien](https://publications.polymtl.ca/70224/)
:::

---

*Publications: 33 · Dernière mise à jour: juin 2026*
